frame_analyses.description: Pre-task setup showing gauze suspended between clamps with circular 4cm diameter cutting pattern marked
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Pattern clearly visible with dashed lines, gauze properly tensioned between clamps

frame_analyses.description: Both instruments visible - left grasper stabilizing gauze, right scissors beginning initial entry cut
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appropriate bimanual technique with stabilization, scissors positioned at edge of pattern

frame_analyses.description: Progressive cutting along circular pattern proceeding clockwise, approximately 25% complete
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth cutting motion following pattern line closely, good instrument coordination

frame_analyses.description: Continuing clockwise cut, approximately 50% of circle completed
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining close adherence to pattern line, consistent cutting technique

frame_analyses.description: Approximately 75% of circular cut completed, nearing completion of full circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cut path appears to track well within 2mm tolerance of marked line

frame_analyses.description: Near completion of circular cut, approximately 90% finished
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Consistent cutting quality maintained throughout, good precision

frame_analyses.description: Circular cut appears completed, cut edges meet to form complete circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean completion of cut pattern, gauze remains attached to clamps

frame_analyses.description: Final view showing completed circular cut with center disc separated
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Complete cut achieved, center portion cleanly separated from surrounding gauze

penalties.description: Estimated minor deviations from marked line at multiple points during cutting

confidence_rationale: Completion time clearly observable from timer. Cutting precision estimated from visual tracking of scissors relative to pattern line, though exact mm measurements difficult from camera angle and resolution.
cannot_determine: Exact mm deviation measurements at each cardinal point due to camera resolution and angle
Precise assessment of 2mm tolerance adherence throughout entire cut
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with smooth, controlled cutting technique. Time of 73 seconds places this in expert range (60-90s). Minimal apparent deviations from pattern line.
strengths: Efficient completion time well within expert range
Consistent bimanual technique with appropriate stabilization
Complete pattern cut without gauze detachment
improvement_suggestions: Maintain even closer adherence to pattern line to minimize deviation penalties
Consider slightly slower cutting speed to improve precision if needed
